like this
how's it going so we take the how is and

we kind of drop the g off so we say how
it going how's it
going then we get even faster so you'll
hear people say things like how's it
going how's it going how's it going
how's it going uh where they compress
the entire phrase down into one word
how's it going how's it going typical
responses to how's it going would be
it's going fine it is going fine it's
